evals.prompt: Build a valuation matrix for NVDA and tell me where it sits vs. fair value
evals.expected_output: Multi-method valuation with fair value range, method comparison, and clear verdict on whether NVDA is cheap/fair/expensive

assertions.name: shows_fair_value_range
assertions.text: Shows a composite bear/base/bull fair value range with specific dollar amounts

assertions.name: uses_dcf
assertions.text: Includes DCF as a valuation method with explicit growth and WACC assumptions

assertions.name: compares_methods
assertions.text: Compares results across multiple methods and explains why they diverge

assertions.name: interprets_reverse_dcf
assertions.text: Uses reverse DCF to assess what growth the market is pricing in and whether it's reasonable

assertions.name: gives_verdict
assertions.text: Provides a clear valuation verdict — overvalued, fairly valued, or undervalued — with reasoning

evals.prompt: Is Microsoft overvalued or undervalued based on its fundamentals?
evals.expected_output: Fundamental valuation analysis with triangulated fair value and a clear overvalued/undervalued opinion

assertions.name: shows_fair_value_range
assertions.text: Shows bear/base/bull fair value range

assertions.name: multiple_methods
assertions.text: Uses at least 3 independent valuation methods

assertions.name: explains_assumptions
assertions.text: Makes DCF assumptions explicit — growth rate, WACC, terminal growth — so user can judge reasonableness

assertions.name: answers_question
assertions.text: Directly answers whether MSFT is overvalued or undervalued with supporting evidence

assertions.name: recommends_next_steps
assertions.text: Recommends next steps (e.g., business-quality for moat assessment, risk-framework for position sizing)

evals.prompt: 腾讯 0700.HK 现在值多少钱？给我一个合理的估值区间
evals.expected_output: HK market valuation with HK-appropriate multiples, Chinese language analysis

assertions.name: handles_hk_ticker
assertions.text: Successfully fetches and values the HK-listed stock with HK market multiples

assertions.name: shows_fair_value_range
assertions.text: Provides a bear/base/bull fair value range in HKD

assertions.name: uses_dcf
assertions.text: Includes DCF valuation with appropriate WACC for HK market

assertions.name: market_expectations
assertions.text: Discusses what growth the market is pricing in via reverse DCF or similar analysis

assertions.name: gives_verdict
assertions.text: Gives a clear verdict on whether Tencent is fairly valued at current price

evals.prompt: What's the fair value for JPM? I'm considering adding it to my portfolio.
evals.expected_output: Bank valuation handling the fact that banks lack EBITDA/FCF, with appropriate caveats

assertions.name: handles_financial_sector
assertions.text: Handles missing EBITDA/FCF gracefully — acknowledges that banks require different valuation approach

assertions.name: shows_fair_value_range
assertions.text: Still provides a fair value range despite limited methods

assertions.name: uses_available_methods
assertions.text: Uses P/E and analyst consensus (the methods that work for banks) effectively

assertions.name: gives_verdict
assertions.text: Provides a clear verdict on whether JPM is attractively priced

assertions.name: investment_context
assertions.text: Provides investment context relevant to the user's stated intent (adding to portfolio)
